FAQ

  • Streaming Platforms

    Here you will find the most popular Kick channels over a set period of time. The statistics for the last 7 and 30 days are available to everyone, whereas the PRO account allows you to select from any range of dates. Our data is updated every minute for Twitch, and every 2 minutes for other platforms.

  • Filters

    Each Kick channel is an outlet for the streaming activities of a particular user. The channel description allows you to access information about the streamer, links to social networks or the broadcast schedule. It also contains the saved streams, popular clips and a chat allowing the subscribers to communicate with the streamer. Channels include not only those of independent streamers but also feature the presence of entire esports and entertainment studios, thematic communities, and broadcasting organizations.

  • Stream Stats

    Filters Air Time, Average Viewers, Hours Watched, Peak Viewers, and Followers gain, can be used to filter and sort channels based on unique metrics. Additionally, users can filter channels by language or game and create customized lists or use existing ones to find specific streamers. You can also analyze the statistics by excluding the partners of the platform, and you can choose to view only the channels that are streaming right now.

  • How to use Streams Charts channels filters

    • For example, a user is interested in finding the most popular Twitch streamer who has broadcasted in English in the Just chatting category for the last 30 days. To do this, they simply need to select "Date by 30 days" under the page name, and the ranking will update. Next, they should select in the right-sidebar Twitch, English language, and Just Chatting from the Games menu. This will reveal that the top Twitch streamer is HasanAbi, followed by zackrawrr and stableronaldo among English-speaking streamers.
    • It's that easy and fast to find the most popular Twitch streamers. By subscribing to PRO, you will have access to more filters and a wider range of dates to choose from. Subscribe now and unlock more possibilities in the world of streaming data!

  • Most watched Kick streamers

    During the last 7 days, maherco was the most watched Kick streamer with a total watch time of 2 287 616. absi reached second place and had 1 602 328 Hours Watched during the same period. sxb ranked third among top Kick streamers and generated 1 360 587 Hours Watched.

  • Top Kick streamers

  • Streaming Platforms

    Here you will find the most popular Twitch, Trovo, NimoTV, Bigo LIVE, Nonolive, SOOP Korea (ex-AfreecaTV), Mildom channels over a set period of time. The statistics for the last 7 and 30 days are available to everyone, whereas the PRO account allows you to select from any range of dates. Our data is updated every minute for Twitch, and every 2 minutes for other platforms.

  • Filters

    Each Twitch, Trovo, NimoTV, Bigo LIVE, Nonolive, SOOP Korea (ex-AfreecaTV), Mildom channel is an outlet for the streaming activities of a particular user. The channel description allows you to access information about the streamer, links to social networks or the broadcast schedule. It also contains the saved streams, popular clips and a chat allowing the subscribers to communicate with the streamer. Channels include not only those of independent streamers but also feature the presence of entire esports and entertainment studios, thematic communities, and broadcasting organizations.

  • Stream Stats

    Filters Air Time, Average Viewers, Hours Watched, Peak Viewers, and Followers gain, can be used to filter and sort channels based on unique metrics. Additionally, users can filter channels by language or game and create customized lists or use existing ones to find specific streamers. You can also analyze the statistics by excluding the partners of the platform, and you can choose to view only the channels that are streaming right now.
